mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS "id", s.register_id AS "registerId", s.department_id AS "departmentId", s.status AS "status", s.ai_escalation_enabled AS "aiEscalationEnabled", s.doctor_last_active_at AS "doctorLastActiveAt", s.creation_time AS "creationTime", r.real_name AS "realName", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", r.gender AS "gender", r.age AS "age", fp.priority_level AS "priorityLevel", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_up_communication_message m WHERE m.session_id = s.id AND m.sender_type = 'patient' ) AS "patientMessageCount", ( SELECT m.content FROM follow_up_communication_message m WHERE m.session_id = s.id ORDER BY m.creation_time DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS "lastMessagePreview", ( SELECT m.creation_time FROM follow_up_communication_message m WHERE m.session_id = s.id ORDER BY m.creation_time DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS "lastMessageTime" FROM follow_up_communication_session s INNER JOIN register r ON r.id = s.register_id LEFT JOIN follow_up_patient_profile fp ON fp.register_id = r.id
s.register_id NOT BETWEEN 1001 AND 1005
AND s.department_id = #{departmentId}
ORDER BY s.creation_time DESC, s.id DESC

SELECT s.id AS "id", s.register_id AS "registerId", s.department_id AS "departmentId", s.status AS "status", s.ai_escalation_enabled AS "aiEscalationEnabled", s.doctor_last_active_at AS "doctorLastActiveAt", s.creation_time AS "creationTime", r.real_name AS "realName", r.case_number AS "caseNumber" FROM follow_up_communication_session s LEFT JOIN register r ON r.id = s.register_id WHERE s.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id AS "id", s.register_id AS "registerId", s.department_id AS "departmentId", s.status AS "status", s.ai_escalation_enabled AS "aiEscalationEnabled", s.doctor_last_active_at AS "doctorLastActiveAt", s.creation_time AS "creationTime", r.real_name AS "realName", r.case_number AS "caseNumber" FROM follow_up_communication_session s LEFT JOIN register r ON r.id = s.register_id WHERE s.register_id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1

SELECT m.id AS "id", m.session_id AS "sessionId", m.sender_type AS "senderType", m.message_type AS "messageType", m.content AS "content", m.card_payload AS "cardPayload", m.summary_id AS "summaryId", m.workflow_run_id AS "workflowRunId", m.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM follow_up_communication_message m WHERE m.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY m.creation_time ASC, m.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_up_communication_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}

SELECT cs.id AS "id", cs.register_id AS "registerId", cs.session_id AS "sessionId", cs.ai_draft_content AS "aiDraftContent", cs.ai_medical_advice AS "aiMedicalAdvice", cs.ai_risk_alerts AS "aiRiskAlerts", cs.doctor_content AS "doctorContent", cs.status AS "status", cs.shared_to_patient AS "sharedToPatient", cs.workflow_run_id AS "workflowRunId", cs.model_id AS "modelId", cs.approved_by AS "approvedBy", cs.approved_at AS "approvedAt", cs.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM follow_up_case_summary cs WHERE cs.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY cs.creation_time DESC, cs.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT cs.id AS "id", cs.register_id AS "registerId", cs.session_id AS "sessionId", cs.ai_draft_content AS "aiDraftContent", cs.ai_medical_advice AS "aiMedicalAdvice", cs.ai_risk_alerts AS "aiRiskAlerts", cs.doctor_content AS "doctorContent", cs.status AS "status", cs.shared_to_patient AS "sharedToPatient", cs.workflow_run_id AS "workflowRunId", cs.model_id AS "modelId", cs.approved_by AS "approvedBy", cs.approved_at AS "approvedAt", cs.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM follow_up_case_summary cs WHERE cs.register_id = #{registerId} AND cs.shared_to_patient = 1 AND cs.status IN ('approved', 'shared') ORDER BY cs.approved_at DESC NULLS LAST, cs.creation_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM follow_up_case_summary WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE follow_up_case_summary SET doctor_content = COALESCE(#{doctorContent}, doctor_content), status = CASE WHEN #{sharedToPatient} = 1 THEN 'shared' ELSE 'approved' END, shared_to_patient = COALESCE(#{sharedToPatient}, shared_to_patient), approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT e.id AS "id", e.payload->>'symptomRelief' AS "symptomRelief", e.summary AS "patientFeedback", e.occurred_at AS "followUpTime" FROM follow_up_history_event e WHERE e.register_id = #{registerId} AND e.event_type = 'patient_feedback' ORDER BY e.occurred_at DESC NULLS LAST, e.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id AS "id" FROM follow_up_day_schedule WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND schedule_date = #{scheduleDate} AND item_type = 'interview' AND status = 'planned' LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", r.real_name AS "realName", r.gender AS "gender", r.age AS "age", mr.diagnosis AS "diagnosis", mr.readme AS "chiefComplaint", mr.allergy AS "allergy" FROM register r LEFT JOIN medical_record mr ON mr.register_id = r.id WHERE r.id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1
